Feedback & Suggestions: App works smoothly! Freighter wallet connected instantly and the contract creation was very fast.
Any Bugs or Issues Encountered?: Freighter network switch was initially set to Mainnet instead of Testnet.

Feedback & Suggestions: Great escrow application. Freighter wallet connection was a bit confusing initially, but the onboarding guide helped a lot.
Simple and clean interface. Love the glassmorphic theme. It would be nice to have support for USDC and EURC stablecoins.
Very secure and transparent. I like that we can verify transaction history on-chain. Please add arbitrator options for disputes.
Fast transaction times and low fees compared to Ethereum escrows. Sentry error reporting gives me confidence in using this.
Tested creating and releasing escrows. The flow is perfect. Direct deep-linking configuration works like a charm.
Really impressed by the UI responsiveness on mobile devices. Wallet kit makes connecting Freighter very seamless.
The contract re-sync works nicely. Cleared my localStorage cache and was able to pull escrow details straight from the ledger.
Any Bugs or Issues Encountered?: Freighter network switch was initially set to Mainnet instead of Testnet.

Feedback & Suggestions: Awesome project for freelancers! Direct payment protection solves a major trust problem. Look forward to mainnet.
User onboarding is highly optimized. I suggest implementing email notifications when a client deposits funds.
